cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those swaps. Let me start by listing the initial positions. Original Assignments: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps. Let me go step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So after this, Dave is right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader? Wait, no. Wait Dave was cheerleader and Bob was right midfielder. So after swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader? Wait, no. Wait, positions are assigned to players. So when Dave and Bob swap, Dave takes Bob's position (right midfielder) and Bob takes Dave's position (cheerleader). So after first swap: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Dave is right midfielder, Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder. So now: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice is right winger, Bob is cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes cheerleader and Bob becomes right winger. Now: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is goalkeeper, Claire is left winger. After swapping, Dave becomes left winger and Claire becomes goalkeeper. Now: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Dave is left winger, Eve is right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Eve becomes left winger. Final positions: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: left winger So the question is, where is Bob at the end? According to this, Bob is right winger. So the answer would be (A) right winger. Wait, let me check my steps again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Original positions: 1. Dave and Bob swap: Dave is right midfielder, Bob is cheerleader. 2. Dave (right midfielder) and Eve (goalkeeper) swap: Dave is goalkeeper, Eve is right midfielder. 3. Alice (right winger) and Bob (cheerleader) swap: Alice is cheerleader, Bob is right winger. 4. Dave (goalkeeper?) Wait, after step 3, Dave is still goalkeeper? Wait step 3 is Alice and Bob swap. Dave's position hasn't changed yet. After step 3: Dave is still goalkeeper? Yes. Then step 4 is Dave and Claire swap. Claire was left winger. So Dave (goalkeeper) and Claire (left winger) swap. Now Dave is left winger, Claire is goalkeeper. Then step 5: Dave (left winger) and Eve (right midfielder) swap again. So Dave becomes right midfielder, Eve becomes left winger. So yes, the final positions are: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger (from step 3 and no further swaps involving Bob) -
